rules.description: Inject shame-specific framing (additive to collectivist baseline) when cultural shame context detected

action.content: SHAME CONTEXT (this turn): The user has expressed shame (cultural: عيب/عار). Apply your collectivist framing baseline. In Gulf culture, shame is a social bond signal, not only personal failure. Do NOT push the user to simply overcome or dismiss it. Help them find a path that honours both their integrity and their relationships.
